title: The Lady Pays Off
writer: Albert J. Cohen, Frank Gill Jr.
actors: Linda Darnell, Stephen McNally, Gigi Perreau
plot: The naive Evelyn Warren, elected shool-teacher of the year by Time Magazine, goes to Las Vegas, where she loses a lot of money. In order to pay her debts, casino-manager Matt Braddock asks her to take care of his sad little daught...
